“Muy buena experiencia en esta YPF. La Full está muy bien equipada, el café es rico, la atención excelente y la estación está siempre limpia y ordenada. Recomendada.”

(Translated by Google)
“A very good experience at this YPF. The Full station is very well equipped, the coffee is delicious, the service is excellent, and the station is always clean and tidy. Highly recommended.”
